name: semifluid
description: Search, inspect, and manage Semifluid collections, schemas, records, attachments, and suggestions from Codex through the Semifluid HTTP API with plugin OAuth.

interface.shortDescription: Search and manage Semifluid data through the API.
interface.longDescription: Adds Semifluid API guidance and a bundled helper for OAuth-backed collection, schema, record, attachment, event, intake form, webhook, and suggestion operations.
defaultPrompt: List all my collections by name
How many collections do I have?
